brief_summary_anonymized: Retail major — Eid collection launch. Risk: indistinguishable from competitor Eid promos.
strategic_insight: Eid clothes are a cultural ritual, not just a sale. Saudis buy new clothes for Eid because that is part of how Saudis do Eid. The brand celebrates the ritual.
execution_summary: Eid Day 1 framing: family arriving at gathering in new clothes. Day 2-3: commercial OK, gift-giving narrative strong. Different tonal phases mapped to different platform days.
what_made_it_work: Eid day-phase awareness (Day 1 non-transactional, Days 2-3 commercial) signals cultural fluency
Multi-day platform sustains engagement across the occasion
what_would_NOT_transplant: Requires brand willing to be non-transactional on Day 1
Pure-commerce brands without ritual angle won't differentiate
